# No-Conversion Debugger

When conversions are missing, do not guess. Walk the tree.

## Root-cause tree

| Layer | Symptom | Likely issue | Next move |
|---|---|---|---|
| Delivery | Low impressions | bids, audience, policy, objective | fix delivery first |
| Attention | Impressions, low CTR | hook or relevance | rewrite angle and first line |
| Inspection | Clicks, high bounce | ad-page mismatch | create dedicated page |
| Trust | Page viewed, no CTA | weak proof or risk | add demo, docs, pricing, objections |
| Activation | Signups, no usage | onboarding friction | sample data and first-value checklist |
| Monetization | Usage, no payment | packaging/value issue | test pricing, paywall, urgency, segment |
| Economics | Conversions, poor CAC | wrong channel/ACV | qualify harder or change channel |

## Required output

```text
Failure layer:
Primary evidence:
Secondary evidence:
Most likely cause:
Next test:
Expected improvement:
Memory update:
```
